Skip to main content

RealDoor

Ready, not eligible.

This service reports document readiness only. It does not decide eligibility, and nothing on this screen means approved, denied, or ineligible. A qualified housing professional makes that determination.

Data source: loading…

RealDoor application readiness copilot

1. Documents and evidence

Every value below is shown together with the place on the page it was read from. Nothing here is inferred about the person.

2. Correct a field

Change a value the system read, and watch the numbers underneath it move — or watch the system explain why your correction was not used.

3. Ask about a rule

Every answer carries its rule id, the authority behind it, the date it took effect, and where in the source it is written.

4. The calculation

Inputs, formula, result, threshold, comparison, effective date. A comparison is not a determination.

5. Readiness packet

What is present, what is missing, what has expired, and what could not be dated — then a download you choose to make.

6. The controls, demonstrated live

A disclaimer is not a control. Each control below can be triggered here and its actual response shown.

7. Our own numbers

Our measured results, including the parts that were not run and the ones that came out badly. Published as measured.

What this system is unsure about

Always visible, never folded away. A system that knows something and does not say it is the failure this product exists to prevent.

About this build

No external fonts, scripts, images, or analytics. This page makes no network request unless you point it at a local API.
